title: Jamaican Pasta Bake
description: A twist on traditional pasta bake, this dish combines the flavors of Jamaica with a comforting classic.
instructions: Cook rigatoni pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tbsp of flaky over medium heat.
Add jamaican jerk seasoning and stir for 1 minute.
Combine cooked pasta, jamaican jerk mixture, and 1 cup of shredded cheddar cheese. Mix well.
Transfer pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with remaining 1 cup of shredded cheddar cheese.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
